TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Carl_Austing, title = Carl_Austing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carl_Austing} }

S.FORM: Carl Austing raral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1910 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Carl Austing, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) sraral Carl Austing praw sinsiy maki Cincinnati hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Carl Austing raral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1910 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Carl Austing, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) sraral Carl Austing praw sinsiy maki Cincinnati hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) s~…ēraral ¶~ ®arl aus~…ētiŇč praw s~…ēins~…ēij maki ¶~ ®in ¶~ ®innati ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
